categories.name: ALL THE DAYS OF MY LIFE

questions.clue: He racked up a number of wedding days: June 11, 1509; Jan, 25, 1533; May 30, 1536; Jan, 6, 1540; July 28, 1540; & July 12, 1543
Jawaharlal Nehru's only child, she worked in government before becoming India's first female prime minister
He worked to develop a flu vaccine before coming up with one for polio, declared safe on April 12, 1955
His P-51 Mustang took out 5 German planes in a single dogfight in World War II; being first to break the sound barrier came later
Born into slavery, she wrote under the name Iola, became a newspaper owner & campaigned against lynching

final.clue: A 2012 book review noted subjects that "sparked his ire": capital punishment, big tobacco & "the plight of the unjustly convicted"
